description: Scribal practice exercises. The dating is likely 16th-century or later based on the paleography. In each heading the instructor provided model handwriting for the student to repeat. On the recto the student practiced broken plural grammatical structures for the words qalem and daftar. On the verso they practiced the names of various articles of clothing: קופטאן צודירי רפיק קושאק. MCD.
tags: clothing, scribal practice, early modern, cmp
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
